name: zarchive_list_create_empty
description: zArchiveList::CreateEmpty allocates a zeroed zArchiveList header.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zArchiveList::CreateEmpty: 22 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 28 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 3 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is allocator-zeroing source shape: current source uses malloc plus memset for the 20-byte zArchiveList header, while the original emits explicit zero stores.
The native smoke verifies that created archive lists start empty and support the recovered push/pop/list accessor behavior.
